title: Hiring Store Manager at ITC Hotels

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at ITC Hotels
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
